---
title: "Vahhab Piranfar"
pagetitle: "Vahhab Piranfar | Antimicrobial Resistance and Antibiotic PK/PD Modeling"
subtitle: "Microbiologist · Antimicrobial Resistance Researcher · Computational Modeler"
description: "Vahhab Piranfar is a molecular microbiologist and computational researcher working on antimicrobial resistance, bacterial modeling, antibiotic PK/PD simulation, pharmacometrics, and reproducible evidence synthesis."
keywords: "antimicrobial resistance, bacterial modeling, antibiotic PK/PD, antimicrobial pharmacometrics, Monte Carlo simulation, virtual populations, clinical microbiology, reproducible research"
toc: false
include-in-header: gtm-head.html
include-before-body: gtm-body.html
---

::: {.hero-panel}

```{=html}
<svg class="hero-science" viewBox="0 0 620 420" fill="none" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M170,232 C210,160 232,132 252,130 C402,114 520,110 600,108 L600,232 Z" fill="rgba(20,184,166,0.16)"/>
<path d="M20,360 C120,352 150,142 252,130 C402,114 520,110 600,108" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.55)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<path d="M20,232 L600,232" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.32)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6 8"/>
<g stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
<polygon points="120,40 149,57 149,91 120,108 91,91 91,57"/>
<circle cx="120" cy="40" r="4.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" stroke="none"/>
<circle cx="149" cy="91" r="4.5" fill="rgba(249,115,22,0.85)" stroke="none"/>
<circle cx="91" cy="91" r="4.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" stroke="none"/>
</g>
<g fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">
<rect x="42" y="322" width="17" height="7" rx="3.5" transform="rotate(24 50 325)"/>
<rect x="78" y="346" width="17" height="7" rx="3.5" transform="rotate(-18 86 349)"/>
<rect x="30" y="360" width="17" height="7" rx="3.5" transform="rotate(52 38 363)"/>
</g>
</svg>
```

::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](profile.jpg){.hero-photo fig-alt="Portrait of Vahhab Piranfar"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Molecular Microbiologist · EB-1A Recipient</span>

## Modeling bacterial pathogens, antibiotic exposure, and antimicrobial resistance

<p class="hero-body">I work at the intersection of <strong>clinical microbiology</strong>, <strong>antimicrobial resistance</strong>, and <strong>computational modeling</strong>. My research combines bacterial evidence, antibiotic PK/PD, virtual populations, and reproducible simulation to investigate pathogen behavior, treatment response, and resistance.</p>

<div class="hero-badges">
<span class="hero-pill">🦠 Antimicrobial Resistance</span>
<span class="hero-pill">📈 Bacterial Modeling</span>
<span class="hero-pill">💊 Antibiotic PK/PD</span>
<span class="hero-pill">🔬 Clinical Microbiology</span>
</div>

[Explore my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-light}  [Read my publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}

<div class="hero-stats">
<div>
<span class="hero-stat-number">33+</span>
<span class="hero-stat-label">Publications</span>
</div>
<div>
<span class="hero-stat-number">650+</span>
<span class="hero-stat-label">Citations</span>
</div>
<div>
<span class="hero-stat-number">15+</span>
<span class="hero-stat-label">Yrs Experience</span>
</div>
<div>
<span class="hero-stat-number">EB-1A</span>
<span class="hero-stat-label">Recognition</span>
</div>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.signature-viz}
::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5}
<span class="viz-eyebrow">The science, visualized</span>

<p class="viz-title">From bacterial evidence to antibiotic target attainment</p>

<p class="viz-lead">My work turns fragmented pharmacokinetic/pharmacodynamic evidence into simulations of how antibiotic exposure clears bacterial pathogens. The curve traces drug concentration over time; the shaded band is the window where exposure stays above the <strong>MIC</strong> and the bacterial population is suppressed.</p>

<div class="viz-legend">
<span class="viz-key"><span class="viz-swatch viz-swatch-curve"></span> Antibiotic concentration</span>
<span class="viz-key"><span class="viz-swatch viz-swatch-mic"></span> MIC threshold</span>
<span class="viz-key"><span class="viz-swatch viz-swatch-area"></span> Time above MIC (target attainment)</span>
<span class="viz-key"><span class="viz-swatch viz-swatch-bug"></span> Bacterial population</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}
```{=html}
<div class="viz-figure">
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 340" role="img" aria-label="Antibiotic concentration-time curve staying above the MIC threshold, with the resulting bacterial population suppressed" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<defs>
<linearGradient id="vizCurve" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#0D9488"/>
<stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#14B8A6"/>
<stop offset="1" stop-color="#0EA5A0"/>
</linearGradient>
<linearGradient id="vizArea" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
<stop offset="0" stop-color="#14B8A6" stop-opacity="0.30"/>
<stop offset="1" stop-color="#14B8A6" stop-opacity="0.02"/>
</linearGradient>
</defs>
<line x1="62" y1="40" x2="62" y2="278" stroke="#CBD5E1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="62" y1="278" x2="592" y2="278" stroke="#CBD5E1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="62" y1="105" x2="592" y2="105" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 6"/>
<line x1="62" y1="225" x2="592" y2="225" stroke="#E2E8F0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 6"/>
<path class="viz-area" d="M158,178 C182,120 198,98 214,94 C348,82 470,80 592,78 L592,178 Z" fill="url(#vizArea)"/>
<line x1="62" y1="178" x2="592" y2="178" stroke="#F97316" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-dasharray="7 6"/>
<text x="598" y="182" fill="#EA580C" font-family="Outfit, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700">MIC</text>
<path class="viz-curve" pathLength="1" d="M62,262 C128,260 158,102 214,94 C348,82 470,80 592,78" stroke="url(#vizCurve)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
<circle class="viz-cmax" cx="214" cy="94" r="5.5" fill="#0D9488" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
<g fill="#0D9488">
<rect class="viz-bug" x="90" y="228" width="19" height="7.5" rx="3.75" transform="rotate(22 99 231)"/>
<rect class="viz-bug" x="120" y="246" width="19" height="7.5" rx="3.75" transform="rotate(-16 129 249)"/>
<rect class="viz-bug" x="80" y="252" width="19" height="7.5" rx="3.75" transform="rotate(54 89 255)"/>
</g>
<g fill="#F97316">
<rect class="viz-bug viz-bug-clear" x="300" y="122" width="16" height="6.5" rx="3.25" transform="rotate(20 308 125)"/>
<rect class="viz-bug viz-bug-clear" x="420" y="112" width="16" height="6.5" rx="3.25" transform="rotate(-24 428 115)"/>
<rect class="viz-bug viz-bug-clear" x="510" y="116" width="16" height="6.5" rx="3.25" transform="rotate(40 518 119)"/>
</g>
<text x="360" y="150" fill="#0F766E" font-family="Outfit, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600">fT &gt; MIC</text>
<text x="24" y="160" fill="#64748B" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="13" transform="rotate(-90 24 160)" text-anchor="middle">Concentration</text>
<text x="327" y="304" fill="#64748B" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">Time after dose</text>
</svg>
</div>
```
:::
:::
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-bug"></i></span> Clinical Microbiology
Pathogen detection, molecular diagnostics, antimicrobial susceptibility, and resistance research across clinical and translational settings.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></span> Antibiotic & Bacterial Modeling
PK/PD simulation, virtual populations, bacterial-response modeling, and quantitative analysis of antibiotic exposure and target attainment.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}
### <span class="feature-icon"><i class="bi bi-globe2"></i></span> Reproducible Research Systems
Provenance-aware evidence synthesis, scientific software, simulation workflows, and transparent computational research packages.
:::
:::
:::

## Current focus

I am a molecular microbiologist and computational researcher working on antimicrobial resistance, bacterial pathogens, and antibiotic PK/PD modeling. Based in **Jersey City, New Jersey**, I combine clinical laboratory experience with pharmacometric simulation, bioinformatics, molecular modeling, and provenance-aware evidence synthesis. My current research focuses on converting fragmented antimicrobial evidence into reproducible models of antibiotic exposure, bacterial response, target attainment, and resistance-related uncertainty.

::: {.info-card}
### Vision Statement
> "The microscope remains essential, but it is no longer our only lens. By combining microbiology with computational modeling, we can study how bacterial pathogens, antibiotic exposure, and resistance interact across scales."
>
> — **Vahhab Piranfar**
:::
